analysis.root_cause: The agent failed to perform the horizontal reflection (mirroring) required to interpret the clock face correctly before calculating the time offset.
The agent failed to correctly interpret the mirrored clock face and perform the time arithmetic, likely due to confusion between the mirrored positions and standard clock reading.
The agent correctly flipped the image but misread the time on the corrected clock (read 7:10 instead of 4:10) and failed the subsequent arithmetic.
The agent misread the mirror-flipped clock face. In the flipped image, the hour hand is between 4 and 5 (closer to 4) and the minute hand is at 2, indicating 4:10, not 7:10.
The agent consistently misreads the mirror-flipped clock face (4:10) as 7:10, leading to incorrect calculations.
